actors.name: User
actors.description: General user of the Berachain ecosystem.

actors.name: Validator
actors.description: Participant in the Proof-of-Liquidity consensus mechanism, responsible for proposing blocks and securing the network.
capabilities: direct $BGT reward emissions to Reward Vaults

actors.name: Guardian
actors.description: Elected signers in a multisig system providing an additional layer of security for governance.
capabilities: cancel malicious governance proposals during timelock period
review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals

actors.name: $BGT Holder
actors.description: User holding $BGT tokens, enabling participation in governance and PoL rewards.
capabilities: earn dApp fees by boosting validators

actors.name: Liquidity Provider
actors.description: User who deposits tokens into liquidity pools.
capabilities: provide liquidity to protocols like BEX
stake receipt tokens in Reward Vaults to earn $BGT

actors.name: Protocol Owner / Ecosystem Project
actors.description: Entity, group, or organization that develops dApps or integrates with Berachain's PoL.
capabilities: submit Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) for whitelisting
offer Incentive tokens in their Reward Vault

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: Wallet address responsible for offering and managing Incentive Tokens for a specific Reward Vault.
capabilities: add Incentive Tokens to a whitelisted Reward Vault
define Incentive Rate for offered tokens
increase Incentive Rate when depositing additional tokens

actors.name: BGT Foundation
actors.description: Organization involved in the governance process, specifically reviewing RFRV proposals.
capabilities: review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals

actors.name: Initial Core Contributor (Big Bera Labs & Advisors)
actors.description: Core contributors to the Berachain blockchain, including Big Bera Labs members and advisors.

actors.name: Investor
actors.description: Seed, Series A, and Series B investors in Berachain.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Individuals or teams building applications and tools on or for Berachain.

actors.name: Berachain Foundation
capabilities: drive evolution of PoL and BeaconKit

assets.name: $BERA Token
assets.description: Native gas and staking token of Berachain.

assets.name: $BGT Token
assets.description: Non-transferrable staking and governance token (Bera Governance Token).

assets.name: $HONEY Token
assets.description: Native stablecoin of the Berachain ecosystem, soft-pegged to USD.

assets.name: Berachain Official NFTs
assets.description: Six official NFT collections (Bong Bears, Bond Bears, Boo Bears, Baby Bears, Band Bears, Bit Bears).

assets.name: Receipt Tokens
assets.description: Tokens representing a user's contribution or position, such as staked assets or liquidity provision.

assets.name: LP Tokens
assets.description: Specific type of receipt token for providing liquidity in DEX pools.

assets.name: Incentive Tokens
assets.description: Whitelisted ERC20 tokens offered by protocols to validators in exchange for $BGT emissions.

assets.name: Voting Power
assets.description: Governance influence derived from holding or being delegated $BGT.

assets.name: Block Rewards
assets.description: $BGT emissions received by validators for proposing blocks and by users via Reward Vaults.

assets.name: Transaction Fees
assets.description: $BERA paid by users for network transactions, partly burned and partly to validators.

assets.name: Validator Stake
assets.description: $BERA tokens locked by validators to participate in consensus.

assets.name: Validator Boost Data
assets.description: Data representing the amount of $BGT delegated to a validator, influencing their reward emissions.

assets.name: Protocol Incentives
assets.description: Tokens offered by protocols within Reward Vaults to attract $BGT emissions.

assets.name: User Private Keys
assets.description: Cryptographic keys stored in wallets, granting access to user assets.

assets.name: $BERA Airdrop Allocation
assets.description: Amount of $BERA tokens allocated to users/entities as part of the airdrop.

assets.name: $USDC
assets.description: USD-pegged stablecoin, used as collateral for $HONEY.

assets.name: $BYUSD ($pyUSD)
assets.description: PayPal USD stablecoin, used as collateral for $HONEY.

assets.name: $WBERA
assets.description: Wrapped BERA token.

assets.name: Social Media Account Data
assets.description: User's social media information used for airdrop eligibility check.

assets.name: Wallet Address
assets.description: Public identifier for a user's account on the blockchain.

assets.name: Governance Proposal Data
assets.description: Information detailing a proposed change to the Berachain protocol or dApps.

assets.name: Liquidity Pool Assets
assets.description: Tokens deposited by Liquidity Providers into DEX liquidity pools.

assets.name: RFRV Form Data
assets.description: Data submitted by Protocol Owners for Reward Vault whitelisting requests.

components.name: Berachain Airdrop Checker Website
components.description: Tool to check $BERA airdrop allocation (checker.berachain.com).

components.name: Berachain Airdrop Claim Website
components.description: Tool to claim $BERA airdrop tokens (airdrop.berachain.com).

components.name: Berachain Governance Contract
components.description: Smart contract managing the on-chain governance lifecycle (proposal creation, voting, execution). Derived from OpenZeppelin's Governance contracts.

components.name: Guardian Multisig System
components.description: A 5-of-9 multisig system operated by Guardians to cancel malicious proposals.

components.name: BeraHub Platform
components.description: Central platform (hub.berachain.com) for managing $BGT, accessing BEX, participating in governance, viewing validators and reward vaults.

components.name: Berachain NFT Bridge Website
components.description: Website (nftbridge.berachain.com) for bridging official Berachain NFTs between Ethereum and Berachain.

components.name: User Wallet Software
components.description: EVM-compatible wallet (e.g., MetaMask, Rabby) used by users to manage keys and interact with Berachain.

components.name: Berachain RPC Endpoint
components.description: Network endpoint for wallets and applications to communicate with the Berachain network.

components.name: Berachain Bridge (LayerZero)
components.description: Canonical bridge (bridge.berachain.com) for transferring tokens to/from Berachain, powered by LayerZero.

components.name: Centralized Exchange (CEX)
components.description: External trading platform where $BERA may be listed.

components.name: Validator Node
components.description: Software run by validators, consisting of BeaconKit and an EVM execution client, to participate in consensus.

components.name: Reward Vault Contract
components.description: Smart contract where users stake PoL-eligible assets to receive $BGT rewards. Must be whitelisted to receive emissions.

components.name: BEX (Berachain Exchange)
components.description: Berachain's native decentralized exchange (DEX) for trading crypto assets and providing liquidity.

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: Modular and customizable consensus layer framework for Ethereum-based blockchains, used by Berachain.

components.name: Honey Swap dApp
components.description: dApp (honey.berachain.com) for trading approved stables/assets for $HONEY and minting/burning $HONEY.

components.name: BeraChef Contract
components.description: Contract involved in Reward Vault whitelisting logic.

components.name: Distributor Contract
components.description: Contract responsible for distributing $BGT emissions to Reward Vaults.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor Contract
components.description: Contract managing the distribution and claiming of Incentive Tokens for users who boosted validators.

components.name: FeeCollector Contract
components.description: Contract that collects fees from core dApps (BEX, Honey Swap) and distributes them to $BGT boosters.

components.name: HoneyFactory Contract
components.description: Central contract for the $HONEY minting process, connecting $HONEY Vaults and minting new $HONEY tokens.

components.name: $HONEY Collateral Vault Contract
components.description: Specialized vault contract for a specific collateral type used to mint $HONEY.

components.name: Berachain Blockchain (L1 Network)
components.description: The Layer 1 blockchain itself, processing transactions and maintaining state.

components.name: Governance Forum Website
components.description: Platform (hub.forum.berachain.com) for discussing governance proposals, including RFRVs.

components.name: BlockRewardController Contract
components.description: Contract that defines parameters for $BGT block reward emissions.

components.name: Auto-Incentivizer System
components.description: System that uses fees from foundation vaults to automatically offer incentives.

components.name: Ethereum Mainnet
components.description: External blockchain from which assets/NFTs can be bridged.

components.name: RFRV Google Form
components.description: Online form for submitting Request for Reward Vault (RFRV).

data_flows.description: User checks airdrop allocation.
User claims $BERA airdrop.
$BGT Holder submits a governance proposal via BeraHub.
BeraHub forwards proposal to Governance Contract.

data_flows.data: NFT Data, Signed Transaction for Bridging
data_flows.description: User bridges NFTs from Ethereum to Berachain.
NFT Bridge updates Berachain with bridged NFT.

data_flows.data: Token Data, Signed Transaction for Bridging
data_flows.description: User bridges tokens via Berachain Bridge.
Validator stakes $BERA on Berachain.
Validator proposes a new block to the network.
Validator directs $BGT emissions to Distributor Contract for Reward Vaults.
Distributor Contract sends $BGT to a Reward Vault.

data_flows.data: Tokens for Liquidity Provision, Receives LP Tokens
data_flows.description: User provides liquidity to BEX.
User stakes LP tokens in a Reward Vault.
$BGT Holder delegates $BGT to a Validator via BeraHub.
User mints $HONEY via Honey Swap dApp.
Honey Swap dApp interacts with HoneyFactory to mint $HONEY.
HoneyFactory deposits collateral into specific $HONEY Collateral Vault.

data_flows.data: Incentive Token Data from Validator Emissions
data_flows.description: Reward Vaults provide data on earned incentives to BGTIncentiveDistributor.
User claims earned incentives via BGTIncentiveDistributor.
FeeCollector distributes collected dApp fees to $BGT boosters via BGTIncentiveDistributor.

trust_boundaries.name: User-Wallet Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary between the human user and their wallet software. Protects user's private keys and transaction intentions.

trust_boundaries.name: Wallet-RPC Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary between the user's wallet and the Berachain RPC endpoint. Protects transaction data in transit.

trust_boundaries.name: User-dApp Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary between the user and a Berachain dApp (e.g., BeraHub). User approves transactions initiated by the dApp.

trust_boundaries.name: dApp-Blockchain Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary where dApp smart contracts interact with the Berachain L1.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain-Ethereum Bridge Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary for cross-chain asset transfers between Berachain and Ethereum via the Berachain Bridge.

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Process Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary encompassing the on-chain governance contract and the Guardian multisig oversight.

trust_boundaries.name: Validator-Network Interface
trust_boundaries.description: Boundary where validator nodes connect to and interact with the Berachain network for consensus.

behaviors.name: User Checks Airdrop
behaviors.description: User submits wallet address or connects socials to Airdrop Checker to see allocation.

behaviors.name: User Claims Airdrop
behaviors.description: User connects wallet and approves transaction on Airdrop Claim site to receive $BERA.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Creates Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder with sufficient $BGT uses BeraHub to create an on-chain governance proposal.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Votes on Proposal
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder casts their vote on an active governance proposal.

behaviors.name: Guardian Cancels Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardians use the multisig system to cancel a malicious proposal during the timelock period.

behaviors.name: User Bridges NFTs
behaviors.description: User uses the Berachain NFT Bridge to transfer official NFTs from Ethereum to Berachain.

behaviors.name: Validator Stakes $BERA
behaviors.description: Validator stakes $BERA through their node to participate in consensus.

behaviors.name: Validator Proposes Block
behaviors.description: Validator node, when selected, proposes a new block to the Berachain network.

behaviors.name: Validator Directs $BGT Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator configures their node or uses a tool to direct their $BGT reward emissions to specific Reward Vaults via the Distributor contract.

behaviors.name: User Provides Liquidity to BEX
behaviors.description: User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool and receives LP tokens.

behaviors.name: User Stakes LP Tokens in Reward Vault
behaviors.description: User stakes their LP tokens (a type of receipt token) into a whitelisted Reward Vault to earn $BGT.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Delegates $BGT
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder uses BeraHub to delegate their $BGT to a chosen validator to boost them.

behaviors.name: Incentive Token Manager Adds Incentives
behaviors.description: Incentive Token Manager adds whitelisted Incentive Tokens to a Reward Vault and sets the rate.

behaviors.name: User Claims Incentives
behaviors.description: User (Booster) claims their share of protocol-provided Incentives and dApp fees via the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract (likely through BeraHub).

behaviors.name: User Mints $HONEY
behaviors.description: User deposits whitelisted collateral into the Honey Swap dApp to mint $HONEY tokens.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Redeems $BGT for $BERA
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder uses BeraHub to burn $BGT in a 1:1 ratio for $BERA.

behaviors.name: Protocol Owner Submits RFRV
behaviors.description: Protocol Owner fills out and submits the RFRV Google Form for their Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: Protocol Owner Posts on Governance Forum
behaviors.description: Protocol Owner creates a post on the Governance Forum detailing their RFRV.
